steps: Add powdered LB ( 25 g ) to deionized water ( 1 L ) LB Research Products International Corp (RPI) Catalog #L24400-2000.0 (CAS: 8013-01-2) n.b. Particulates may remain after addition, but these will dissolve during the autoclave cycle
Select antibiotic from the list below:
Add 50 mg kanamycin and mix thoroughly Kanamycin Research Products International Corp (RPI) Catalog #K22000-25.0 (CAS: 25389-94-0)
Add 100 mg ampicillin and mix thoroughly Ampicillin Research Products International Corp (RPI) Catalog #A40040-25.0 (CAS: 69-52-3)
Select the type of media from the list below:

Add powdered tryptic soy broth ( 30 g ) to deionized water ( 1 L ) Tryptic Soy Broth Fisher Scientific Catalog #DF0370-07-5 n.b. Particulates may remain after addition, but these will dissolve during the autoclave cycle
creator: Andrew Crowley
